description: AD lateral movement attack preconditions catalog. Covers Kerberoasting, AS-REP roasting, delegation abuse, ACL abuse, DCSync, password in description, and AdminSDHolder abuse. Evidence sources: BloodHound (v4/v5), ldapdomaindump, raw LDAP, manual JSON.
